---
title: identical-switch-conditions
description: "Detect repeated switch conditions."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Detect repeated switch conditions. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
switch { case ready: one(); case ready: two() }
```

## Good

```go
switch { case first: one(); case second: two() }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only identical-switch-conditions`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
